event_coverage.note: All 7 event types covered; UserPromptSubmit intentionally absent

false_positive_risk.note: observe.sh * matcher + tdd-guard false-positives on Go/Rust/Python

performance_impact.note: 3 synchronous blocking hooks: worst case 65s per Rust edit

error_handling.note: exitCode dead code in format-dispatch; console.log in doc-file-warning

dead_references.note: All 21 referenced scripts verified to exist

dead_hooks.note: No dead hooks; typecheck hooks conditionally no-op in non-matching projects

interaction_conflicts.note: format-dispatch rewrites file before typecheck reads it

issues.finding: execFileSync (synchronous) with 5s timeout blocks Claude Code on every file edit
issues.suggestion: Add "async": true to this hook entry in hooks/hooks.json

issues.finding: execFileSync('cargo check') with 60s timeout, no async:true — blocks up to 60s per .rs edit
issues.suggestion: Add "async": true and "timeout": 30 to hooks/hooks.json. Add rate-limiting (max once per 60s)

issues.finding: execFileSync('npx tsc --noEmit') with 30s timeout, no async:true — blocks 10-30s per .ts/.tsx edit
issues.suggestion: Add "async": true to the hook entry in hooks/hooks.json

issues.finding: exitCode set to 1 on formatter failure (line 158) but process.exit(0) always called (line 169). exitCode is dead code.
console.log(data) appends trailing newline to JSON stdout — can corrupt downstream JSON parsing
* matcher fires on every tool call (100+ times/session = 100+ background bash processes)
issues.suggestion: Narrow matcher to "Edit|Write|Bash" or add early-exit in observe.sh for non-learning-relevant tools

issues.finding: Only 6 hardcoded test path candidates. Go, Python, Rust projects always get false-positive 'no test found' warnings
issues.suggestion: Extend candidates list; suppress nudge for .rs files (inline tests produce no separate file)

issues.finding: format-dispatch rewrites file; typecheck runs tsc against disk — type errors may reference pre-formatted line numbers
issues.suggestion: Make typecheck async:true so it always reads final disk state

issues.finding: bare make and docker patterns match fast subcommands (make help, docker ps) — spurious tmux reminders
issues.suggestion: Tighten to make (build|test|all|install) and docker (build|run|compose up)

issues.finding: .clarc/context.md, docs/decisions/ADR-001.md, TODO.md trigger the non-standard doc warning incorrectly
issues.suggestion: Add docs/decisions/ and .clarc/ to the exclusion patterns

root_fix: Add async:true to post-edit-format-dispatch, post-edit-typecheck, and post-edit-typecheck-rust in hooks/hooks.json
